ground_truth.title: Online AI & Machine Learning Bootcamp | Virginia Tech
ground_truth.main_content: Virginia Tech AI & Machine Learning Bootcamp - Gain In-Demand Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Skills. Gain the skills in Applied Data Science with Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and Generative AI, to build or expand a career in the rapidly-growing, lucrative field of AI and machine learning with the part-time Virginia Tech AI & Machine Learning Bootcamp. The bootcamp covers essential technologies including PyTorch, NLTK, DALL-E, ChatGPT, Jupyter Notebook, Keras, LangChain, Huggingface, and Miro. Students work on hands-on projects including Autonomous Driving Vehicles and Capstone Projects. The program transforms professionals from various backgrounds into AI and machine learning practitioners. Continuous learning support is provided throughout the bootcamp journey.
